caption: The video features a speaker at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, dressed in a suit, is engaged in delivering a presentation or interview, likely discussing topics related to MongoDB and its applications. He gestures with his right hand, emphasizing points as he speaks. In the background, several attendees can be seen, some standing and others walking, indicating an active and bustling conference environment. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text on the screen, suggesting a focus on database technology and innovation. The setting appears professional, with a clear emphasis on networking and knowledge sharing among industry professionals.
